name: Totango API
what_it_does: REST API for Totango's customer success platform, providing access to accounts, users, metrics, touchpoints, and task management for B2B SaaS teams.
use_cases: Push product usage events and traits to Totango for health scoring
Sync account and user data from CRM or data warehouse into Totango
Retrieve touchpoints and CS activity for reporting
Automate task creation based on account signals
Build custom dashboards using Totango account health data
not_for: Consumer-focused products — Totango is designed for B2B SaaS
Real-time high-throughput event streaming at scale
best_when: You are a B2B SaaS company using Totango and need to automate data ingestion, sync CS workflows with other tools, or build custom integrations on top of customer health data.
avoid_when: You need a free-tier or trial API access to evaluate before committing, or require comprehensive SDK support.

auth.notes: Authentication uses a service ID and app key combination passed as request parameters or headers

pricing.paid_tiers: Subscription tiers for SMB through enterprise; API access included with paid plans
pricing.notes: Pricing is not publicly listed; sales-led. Totango acquired Catalyst in 2023 and expanded platform.

performance.rate_limits: API calls limited; specific limits depend on subscription tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HTTP status codes returned but error bodies are often sparse; debugging can require support tickets
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Data ingestion endpoints are generally upsert-style but not all operations are idempotent
known_agent_gotchas: Service ID + app key combination is non-standard auth — agents may need custom handling
Documentation hosted on Zendesk help center rather than developer portal; harder to navigate
Rate limits not clearly published; plan for conservative throttling
Platform has merged with Catalyst post-acquisition; some docs may be inconsistent
Bulk ingestion has size limits not well-documented

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced, service ID + app key auth, SOC2 Type II certified
